headline: Q1 Earnings Outperformers: Cintas (NASDAQ:CTAS) And The Rest Of The Industrial & Environmental Services Stocks
summary: Wrapping up Q1 earnings, we look at the numbers and key takeaways for the industrial & environmental services stocks, including Cintas (NASDAQ:CTAS) and its peers.

headline: Vince Holding Corp. (VNCE) Reports Q1 Loss, Beats Revenue Estimates
summary: Vince Holding (VNCE) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of -23.08% and +1.57%, respectively, for the quarter ended April 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
